violations.text: Employee observed drying hands on cloth towel. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Utensils are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of plastic. Chest freezers have an accumulation of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The floor in the walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
